query:
-- 查询角色包含"老师"但在user_role_cities表中没有城市数据的用户
SELECT 
  u.id,
  u.name,
  u.nickname,
  u.phone,
  u.email,
  u.roles,
  u.teacherAttribute,
  u.teacherStatus
FROM users u
WHERE u.roles LIKE '%老师%'
  AND u.id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT userId 
    FROM user_role_cities 
    WHERE role = '老师'
  )
  AND u.deletedAt IS NULL
ORDER BY u.id;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute
